report.title: e-Surveyor: Conservation Statuses
report.description: Report for a user's species data conservation statuses in e-Surveyor
report.query:
-- category designation occurrence_count species_count
SELECT 'Your area' AS category, lr.local_rarity as designation, COUNT(distinct o.id) AS occurrence_count, COUNT(distinct cttl.taxon_meaning_id) AS species_count FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id LEFT JOIN esurveyor.local_rarity lr ON lr.tvk=cttl.external_key AND lr.sq00km='#sq100km#' #joins# WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id# #filters# GROUP BY 1, 2 UNION SELECT 'GB Red List' AS category, case when td.abbreviation is null then 'None' when td.abbreviation IN ('CR', 'CR(PE)') then 'Critically Endangered' when td.abbreviation='EN' then 'Endangered' when td.abbreviation='NR' then 'Nationally Rare' when td.abbreviation='NT' then 'Near Threatened' when td.abbreviation='RE' then 'Regionally Extinct' when td.abbreviation='VU' then 'Vulnerable' else td.abbreviation end AS designation, COUNT(distinct o.id) AS occurrence_count, COUNT(distinct cttl.taxon_meaning_id) AS species_count FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id LEFT JOIN (taxa_taxon_designations ttd JOIN taxon_designations td ON td.id=ttd.taxon_designation_id AND td.category_id = 7667 AND td.abbreviation IN ('CR', 'CR(PE)', 'EN', 'NR', 'NT', 'RE', 'VU') JOIN cache_termlists_terms cat ON cat.id=td.category_id ) ON ttd.taxon_id=cttl.taxon_id and ttd.deleted=false #joins# WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id# #filters# GROUP BY 1, 2
